content: New paper published in Teaching and Teacher Education: “The contagious relationship between principals’ stress and teachers’ occupational well-being.”
I’m starting a new position as Research Fellow at NIE!
Two papers accepted at AERA 2026 in Los Angeles.
Received my Ph.D. degree at The Chinese University of Hong Kong graduation ceremony!
I successfully defended my PhD thesis today!
New paper published in International Journal of Educational Research (with Yin & Jiang): “Revisiting the research on teachers’ emotion regulation.”
Presented two papers at AERA 2025 in Denver.
Received the Best Poster Award at the ECNU–CUHK Positive Education Symposium in Shanghai.
New paper published in Teaching and Teacher Education: “Profiles of teacher self-efficacy and their relations to teacher demographics and affective well-being.”
